description: A specialized logistics consultancy is selling a 'Warehouse Modernization Package' to 'Titanium Manufacturing'. Configure a service product named 'Logistics Site Audit' ($2,500.00) as a service with a prepaid invoicing policy that triggers the creation of a task in a new project. Process a sales order for 'Titanium Manufacturing' containing one 'Logistics Site Audit' and five 'Industrial Barcode Scanner' units ($450.00 each). Confirm the sale, verify the automated project creation, process the delivery of the physical goods, and post the invoice for the full order.
